query: SELECT id, title, brand, asin, price, description FROM products LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.f21199908ec6 --database Fb7vXnzeJhLwFywj8Ci5L6 --execute SELECT id, title, brand, asin, price, description FROM products LIMIT 5;

rows.title: 14K Gold Diamond Solitaire Necklace
rows.description: Elegant 14K yellow gold necklace featuring a 0.25 carat round brilliant diamond solitaire pendant. Perfect for everyday luxury.

rows.title: Sterling Silver Tennis Bracelet
rows.description: Classic sterling silver tennis bracelet with 3.00 carats total weight of sparkling cubic zirconia stones. Timeless elegance.

rows.title: Rose Gold Stackable Ring Set
rows.description: Set of 3 delicate 14K rose gold filled stackable rings. Mix and match for a personalized look that transitions from day to night.

rows.title: Gold Hoop Earrings 14K
rows.description: Classic 14K gold hoop earrings, 30mm diameter. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear. A wardrobe essential.

rows.title: White Gold Diamond Eternity Band
rows.description: 14K white gold eternity band with 1.00 carat total weight of channel-set round diamonds. Stackable and stunning.

2	Sterling Silver Tennis Bracelet	PAVOI	B08DEMO002	79.99	Classic sterling silver tennis bracelet with 3.00 carats total weight of sparkling cubic zirconia stones. Timeless elegance.
3	Rose Gold Stackable Ring Set	Caitlyn Minimalist	B08DEMO003	45.99	Set of 3 delicate 14K rose gold filled stackable rings. Mix and match for a personalized look that transitions from day to night.
4	Gold Hoop Earrings 14K	Mevecco	B08DEMO004	129.99	Classic 14K gold hoop earrings, 30mm diameter. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear. A wardrobe essential.
5	White Gold Diamond Eternity Band	KATARINA	B08DEMO005	399.99	14K white gold eternity band with 1.00 carat total weight of channel-set round diamonds. Stackable and stunning.
